title: secretx-bitwarden: implement Bitwarden Secrets Manager backend
description: Implement SecretStore for Bitwarden Secrets Manager. URI: secretx://bitwarden/<project-name>/<secret-name>. Auth via BWS_ACCESS_TOKEN env var (machine account access token). Secrets are identified by UUID internally; backend resolves project-name+secret-name to UUID on first access and caches the mapping via secretx-cache. If two secrets in the same project share a name, get() returns SecretError::Backend describing the ambiguity. put() creates or updates by name. refresh() re-resolves name-to-UUID and re-fetches. Does not implement SigningBackend. Dep: secretx-core, secretx-cache, bitwarden-sm SDK.
